case_title: KAI SHING POON et al VS. LINDA MAIE MESSITT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($75.00 SERVICE FEE) SERVED DEC-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MESSITT, LINDA MAIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POON, KAI SHING LAM, CHUI MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESSITT, LINDA MAIE $3,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,400.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $1500.00 TO PLAINTIFF KAI SHING POON, AND $1750.00 TO PLAINTIFF CHUI MEI LAM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MESSITT, LINDA MAIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY POON, KAI SHING LAM, CHUI MEI AS TO DEFENDANT MESSITT, LINDA MAIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
